title: Mouja+

content.value: Mouja+ combines real-time neural audio synthesis using Thales and Stacco with Stable Audio, prompted on stage with Fluxus text scores. Sonic textures are dynamically layered as inputs for timbre transfer.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}
_comment_links: To add external links, add objects like: {"label": "GitHub", "url": "https://..."}
